languages.text: Гробница преобразилась, и путь назад оказался отрезан. Лорд-капитан оказал{mf|ся|ась} заперт{mf||а} на левитирующей платформе.
The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.
languages.original_text: Гробница преобразилась, и путь назад оказался отрезан. Лорд-капитан оказал{mf|ся|ась} заперт{mf||а} на левитирующей платформе.

traits.locale_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

languages.text: Die Gruft hat sich transformiert und den dahinter liegenden Wag versperrt. Der Lord Captain ist auf einer schwebenden Plattform gestrandet.
languages.original_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

traits.locale_text: Die Gruft hat sich transformiert und den dahinter liegenden Wag versperrt. Der Lord Captain ist auf einer schwebenden Plattform gestrandet.

languages.text: La tombe s'est transformée, scellant la voie que vous avez empruntée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} est {mf|bloqué|bloquée} sur une dalle flottante.
languages.original_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

traits.locale_text: La tombe s'est transformée, scellant la voie que vous avez empruntée. {mf|Le seigneur-capitaine|La seigneure-capitaine} est {mf|bloqué|bloquée} sur une dalle flottante.

languages.text: 墓穴发生了变化，退路已被封死。舰长大人被困在一块悬浮平台上。
languages.original_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

traits.locale_text: 墓穴发生了变化，退路已被封死。舰长大人被困在一块悬浮平台上。

languages.text: La tumba se ha transformado, sellando el camino hacia atrás. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán está atrapad{mf|o|a} en una losa flotante.
languages.original_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

traits.locale_text: La tumba se ha transformado, sellando el camino hacia atrás. {mf|El|La} Lord Capitán está atrapad{mf|o|a} en una losa flotante.

languages.text: 墓は変形し、戻る道は断たれていた。キャプテンは浮遊台に閉じ込められた。
languages.original_text: The tomb was transformed and the way back was cut off. The Lord Captain was trapped on a levitating platform.

languages.text: Mezar, dönüşerek arkadaki yolu kapattı. Lord Kaptan yüzen bir tabakanın üzerinde mahsur kaldı.
languages.original_text: The tomb transformed, sealing away the path behind. The Lord Captain stands stranded on a floating slab.

traits.locale_text: Mezar, dönüşerek arkadaki yolu kapattı. Lord Kaptan yüzen bir tabakanın üzerinde mahsur kaldı.
